title: Synthetic Message
description: Schema for a synthetic communication message used in the SignalTrace CE examples.

id.description: Unique identifier for the message. Must be synthetic and non-identifying.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

content.description: The body of the message. Should not contain real personal data.

metadata.description: Optional metadata with additional fields such as tags, channel or synthetic phone numbers.
